_comment: Classification of extracted Unit 1+2 questions from 5 Steps and Barron's. Each entry maps source-question to existing question_type_id (UUID prefix matches /tmp/ap-phys1-qts-units-1-2.json). 'confidence' is high|medium|low. 'skip' rows are documented reasons (out of scope or no good match).

skipped.barrons_ch01_vectors_all: Vector decomposition is prerequisite skill, not specific to a Unit 1/2 SLO. Recommend creating one new 'Vector decomposition (components, magnitude, direction)' QT later if the user wants vectors as a standalone practice topic.
skipped.5steps_ch11_q4_gas_mileage: Conceptual question really about work-energy (Unit 3); no Unit 3 QTs exist yet.
skipped.5steps_ch14_q2_angular_momentum: Unit 6 (Energy and Momentum of Rotating Systems); no QTs exist.
